dbEncryptionKey.description: At-rest credential encryption key. Generate with: openssl rand -base64 32

dbEncryptionKeyFrom.description: External secret reference for dbEncryptionKey. When name and key are both non-empty, the dbEncryptionKey inline value is ignored.

igdbClientId.description: IGDB API client ID. Required — nexorious will not function without valid IGDB credentials.

igdbClientSecret.description: IGDB API client secret. Required — nexorious will not function without valid IGDB credentials.

databaseUrl.description: External database URL. Leave empty to use in-cluster PostgreSQL.

legendaryWorkDir.description: Absolute path for the Legendary work directory. When non-empty, the chart injects LEGENDARY_WORK_DIR on the main container and mounts an emptyDir volume at this path. Leave empty to disable Epic Games Store sync.

tmpDir.description: Writable /tmp emptyDir mounted on the main container. Required because readOnlyRootFilesystem is true; the app stages backups (pg_dump output + cover-art copy) and buffers restore-upload tarballs under os.TempDir() before archiving/extracting.

sizeLimit.description: Kubernetes resource quantity capping the emptyDir size (e.g. 2Gi, 500Mi). Bump if cover-art library or restore payloads exceed the default.

reloader.description: Annotate the nexorious Deployment with reloader.stakater.com/auto: "true" so Stakater Reloader (if installed) restarts the pod when a referenced Secret or ConfigMap changes. Inert without Reloader. Never applied to the in-cluster PostgreSQL.

password.description: PostgreSQL password. Leave empty to auto-generate on first install (preserved across upgrades via lookup of the existing managed Secret). Use only URL-safe characters when relying on auto-built DATABASE_URL.

usernameFrom.description: External secret reference for the in-cluster Postgres pod's POSTGRES_USER. When name and key are both non-empty, the inline username is ignored for the postgres pod's env.

passwordFrom.description: External secret reference for the in-cluster Postgres pod's POSTGRES_PASSWORD. When name and key are both non-empty, the inline password is ignored for the postgres pod's env.

databaseFrom.description: External secret reference for the in-cluster Postgres pod's POSTGRES_DB. When name and key are both non-empty, the inline database name is ignored for the postgres pod's env.

igdbClientIdFrom.description: External secret reference for igdbClientId. When name and key are both non-empty, the igdbClientId inline value is ignored.

igdbClientSecretFrom.description: External secret reference for igdbClientSecret. When name and key are both non-empty, the igdbClientSecret inline value is ignored.

databaseUrlFrom.description: External secret reference for DATABASE_URL (URI mode). Mutually exclusive with databaseUrl and db*From. When name and key are both non-empty, points to a key in the external secret containing the full connection URL.

dbHostFrom.description: External secret reference for DB_HOST (individual keys mode). Mutually exclusive with databaseUrl and databaseUrlFrom.

dbPortFrom.description: External secret reference for DB_PORT (individual keys mode). Mutually exclusive with databaseUrl and databaseUrlFrom.

dbUserFrom.description: External secret reference for DB_USER (individual keys mode). Mutually exclusive with databaseUrl and databaseUrlFrom.

dbPasswordFrom.description: External secret reference for DB_PASSWORD (individual keys mode). Mutually exclusive with databaseUrl and databaseUrlFrom.

dbNameFrom.description: External secret reference for DB_NAME (individual keys mode). Mutually exclusive with databaseUrl and databaseUrlFrom.

alerts.description: Opt-in log-based alert rules (Loki ruler ConfigMap + VictoriaLogs VMRule). Default off.

enabled.description: Master switch. Must be true for any alert object to render.
Render the Loki ruler ConfigMap (requires alerts.enabled).

ruleLabel.description: Discovery label the Loki ruler sidecar watches.

enabled.description: Render VictoriaLogs alert rules (requires alerts.enabled). Form chosen by delivery.

delivery.description: vmrule = VMRule CR (VictoriaMetrics Operator); configmap = plain ConfigMap of the rules file for setups without the operator.

ruleLabels.description: Extra labels on the rendered object (VMRule ruleSelector match, or ConfigMap sidecar-discovery tag).
